nodes.context: Enforcer unit and hit squad for the Sinaloa Cartel, based in Culiacán, Sinaloa, Mexico.
Major crime syndicate based in Sinaloa, Mexico.
Rival drug cartel to the Sinaloa Cartel, operating in western Mexico.
Drug cartel that supported the Beltrán Leyva Cartel in the Tubutama shooting.
Gang headed by Fausto Isidro Meza Flores, part of the Beltrán Leyva Cartel.
Ally of Los Ántrax listed in infobox.
Ally of Los Ántrax listed in infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Los Ántrax is a large enforcer unit and hit squad for the Sinaloa Cartel
edges.context: Los Ántrax is a sub-unit of the Sinaloa Cartel, providing enforcement and security.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Los Mazatlecos, Los Zetas, Mexican Army, Cártel de los Beltrán-Leyva
edges.context: Los Ántrax and Beltrán Leyva Cartel are rivals.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Los Mazatlecos, Los Zetas, Mexican Army, Cártel de los Beltrán-Leyva
edges.context: Los Ántrax and Los Zetas are rivals.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Los Mazatlecos, Los Zetas, Mexican Army, Cártel de los Beltrán-Leyva
edges.context: Los Ántrax and Los Mazatlecos are rivals.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel, Gente Nueva, Los Chapitos
edges.context: Los Ántrax and Gente Nueva are allies.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel, Gente Nueva, Los Chapitos
edges.context: Los Ántrax and Los Chapitos are allies.

edges.evidence_quote: A fierce gunfight between members of the Sinaloa Cartel (with the backing of Los Ántrax) and the Beltrán Leyva Cartel (with the support of Los Zetas) left about 30 dead in the town of Tubutama, Sonora in northern Mexico on 1 July 2010.
edges.context: Sinaloa Cartel and Beltrán Leyva Cartel engaged in a gunfight in Tubutama, Sonora on 1 July 2010.

edges.evidence_quote: A fierce gunfight between members of the Sinaloa Cartel (with the backing of Los Ántrax) and the Beltrán Leyva Cartel (with the support of Los Zetas) left about 30 dead in the town of Tubutama, Sonora in northern Mexico on 1 July 2010.
edges.context: Los Zetas supported the Beltrán Leyva Cartel in the Tubutama gunfight.

edges.evidence_quote: Meza Flores and his gang are reportedly part of the Beltrán Leyva Cartel
edges.context: Los Mazatlecos is a part of the Beltrán Leyva Cartel.
